name: Lasagne Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Sauce: Heat oil in a heavy large skillet over medium-high heat. Add onions, garlic, pepper, carrot, basil, marjoram, and pepper. Cook until vegetables are tender, stirring frequently.
2. Add wine and boil until almost all liquid evaporates (about 5 minutes). Add tomatoes; break up large pieces with a spoon. Mix in tomato paste. Reduce heat to low, cover, and cook for 45 minutes, stirring occasionally. Uncover and simmer until sauce thickens slightly (about 10 minutes).
3. Filling: Heat oil in a skillet over medium heat. Add mushrooms, leek, shallot, garlic, marjoram, lemon peel, rosemary, mace, and pepper. Cook for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Uncover and simmer until reduced to a thick paste (about 10 minutes). Mix in parmesan cheese and salt.
5. Transfer mixture to a small bowl. Cover and refrigerate at least 20 minutes (filling can be prepared up to one day ahead).
6. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
7. Cook noodles until tender but firm to the bite. Drain and submerge in cold water; drain again.
8. Spread half of the tomato sauce over the bottom of a 9-inch square baking pan. Pat one noodle dry. Place on the work surface.
9. Spread three tablespoons filling on the noodle, leaving a 1 1/2 inch border at each end. Roll up into a jelly roll formation.
10. Arrange the seam side down over the sauce in the pan. Repeat with remaining noodles so they just touch.
11. Cover and bake for 25 minutes. Spoon remaining saucedecoratively over rolls. Cover and bake an additional 20 minutes.
12. Sprinkle with remaining three tablespoons parmesan cheese. Bake uncovered until cheese melts (about 5 minutes).
